name: Rosie O'Donnell
description: American comedian, producer, actress, and television personality
abstract: Roseann O'Donnell (born March 21, 1962) is an American talk show host, comedian, and actress. She began her comedy career as a teenager and received her breakthrough on the television series Star Search in 1984.

about_quotes.evidence: And we’d do appearances on Rosie O’Donnell or Conan O’Brien — a few TV shows
